title: Diagnostic Specimen Exceeds Stability Window
scenario: A diagnostic specimen is used after its stability window has expired.
initial_state: The specimen was valid for diagnostic use within its stability period.
state_transition: The specimen stability window expired before use.
execution_boundary: The diagnostic action is evaluated before relying on the specimen.
constitutional_evaluation: Temporal admissibility requires that diagnostic evidence remain valid at use time.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because the specimen no longer satisfies its temporal validity condition.
proof_conclusion: Clinical execution must fail closed when diagnostic evidence exceeds its stability window.
